name: Honey Curry Marinade
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 teaspoons curry powder, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the butter buds, honey, prepared mustard, and salt.
2. Stir in the curry powder until well mixed.
3. Refrigerate any unused portion.
4. Brush the marinade onto chicken or pork just before grilling or broiling.
5. Alternatively, marinate chicken and bake, basting occasionally.
